title: Spike: Investigate the CNCF provided CI infrastructure
body:
With podman and friends got contributed to CNCF, please investigate the possibility of moving podman CI infra to CNCF sponsored infra.

The scope of this issue is to investigate what can be moved and what cannot be moved to CNCF infra and find the alternatives for what cannot be moved to CNCF infra.

comments.body: close this spike. we conclude current ci (cirrus-ci) will not support oracle infra without setting up k8s cluster. this is no aligned with what we are trying to do and cirrus-ci won't have time to support us until Q1 2026. hence close the ticket
